title: THE HISTORY OF AFRICA
author: ANTHONY JR. MWESIGWA
description: A textbook for Christian high school and early university students exploring the rich tapestry of African history through a biblical lens, reclaiming narratives and fostering a deeper understanding of God's work in the continent.

chapters.title: The Lands of Phut — Carthage, Numidia, and the Desert Kingdoms
The Lands of Cush — From Babel to the Eve of Roman Africa
The Church in Roman Africa (c. 30 BC – 700 AD)
Egypt under Rome and the Rise of the Alexandrian Church (30 BC – 700 AD)
The Churches of the Highlands: Aksum, Conversion, and Survival (c. 50–900 AD)
The Peopling of Africa: The Bantu Migrations and the Forgotten Clans (c. 300 BC – 800 AD)
Ethiopia Alone: The Hidden Kingdom (c. 900–1500 AD)
Trade Winds and Stone Cities (c. 1000–1500 AD)
